notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.19.3
Major Update to GAIA Database. Astrometric Databases Available, Stellar Neighborhood Explorer, includes the entire 1.6B star DR3 release broken down into magnitude groups depending on how deep you want to go.

Major Update to Plate Solver. Inhouse plate solver now uses GAIA Astrometric databases with a much improved algorithm for extremely fast and accurate SASpro native plate solving.

Stacking Suite updates for auto stacking directory creation and redirection if you forget to update the stacking directory.

Bug and UX fixes in Planetary Stacking, NUMBA use, Thread Safe locations for mac users, and more.
